overall.description: First-person footage of walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The surrounding area is pitch black with only the path ahead visible in the beam of light.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dark trail, illuminating the path ahead with a handheld light source

large boulder or rock formation visible on the right side of the path

dark night sky with faint moon visible

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through tall grass at night. The scene is illuminated only by a flashlight or headlamp, revealing the uneven path ahead while the surrounding vegetation and distant trees remain in darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a secluded dirt trail shrouded in the deep darkness of night. It begins with the camera advancing steadily, where a narrow beam of light from a flashlight or headlamp carves a path through the gloom. As the camera pushes forward, the light reveals the uneven texture of the dirt trail and the swaying blades of tall grass lining the way. The scene remains focused on the immediate path ahead, while the surrounding vegetation and distant trees stay submerged in an impenetrable black void.
